holdings.infoBox: EMIF is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings.

overview.description: The iShares Emerging Markets Infrastructure ETF (EMIF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Emerging Markets Infrastructure index, a market-cap-weighted index of infrastructure companies operating in emerging markets. EMIF was launched on Jun 16, 2009 and is issued by BlackRock.
